verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Yours is dominion and strength all honor is Yours alone. Heaven and earth bow before You with fear. The sky is open, death is conquered. And honor is Yours alone.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Nothing overcomes Your name, Your power. King of the world, all creation sings to You. God of eternity You are wonderful, You are wonderful. And the call of this world will be Your praise. God Your wonderful name will shine forever as light. Because the glory is Yours. God forever all glory is Yours.
